     The Numbers Business Report

Self/Less (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $12,279,691Details
International Box Office $21,387,628
Worldwide Box Office $33,667,319
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,096,970
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,222,401
Total $3,319,371
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In this psychological science fiction thriller, an extremely wealthy man dying from cancer undergoes a radical medical procedure that transfers his consciousness into the body of a healthy young man. But all is not as it seems when he starts to uncover the mystery of the body's origin and the organization that will kill to protect its cause.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,403,460 (44.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.27 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,353 opening theaters/2,353 max. theaters, 2.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $17,421,725

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 10th, 2015 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: June 8th, 2015 (Wide) (Czech Republic)
July 10th, 2015 (Wide) (Turkey)
July 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Netherlands)
July 16th, 2015 (Wide) (Croatia)
July 17th, 2015 (Wide) (Bulgaria)
Video Release: October 27th, 2015 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence, some sexuality, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2362, 2/25/2015)
Running Time: 117 minutes
Plot point: Body Swap, Cancer, Faked Death, Faulty Memory, Fugitive / On the Run, Inventor, Medical and Hospitals, Medical Crimes, Money Troubles, Terminal Illness, Transferring Consciousness
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Time period setting: Near Future
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Ram Bergman Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
